title: notholaena hirta
intro: Notholaena hirta, also known as hairy fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae, native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Notholaena hirta include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Notholaena hirta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
